news.t: AI Investing App Dravo Launches from Hedge Fund Veteran Behind ETF That Beat the S&P 500 in 2025

overview.description: The Draco Evolution AI ETF (DRAI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed, fund-of-funds, investing in diverse asset classes such as US equities, gold, bonds, and currencies. The portfolio may include inverse and leveraged exposure DRAI was launched on Jul 10, 2024 and is issued by Draco.

data.title: AI Investing App Dravo Launches from Hedge Fund Veteran Behind ETF That Beat the S&P 500 in 2025
data.text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Draco Evolution, the investment firm behind the NYSE-listed Draco AI ETF (NYSE: DRAI), posting full-year 2025 returns of 33.67% (at market) and 33.62% (at NAV), compare...
